tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: I'm almost done with the assignment and have plenty of time, so I can finish this quickly before grabbing a meal with my friends.

The deadline just passed while I was 95% done, which feels like a missed opportunity to finish and relax with my friends. I'm worried about the professor's reaction since avoiding conflict is so important to me.

desires: Not feel like I let down my close friends by canceling our meal because of this stress.
Avoid the awkward confrontation or disappointment from the professor if I have to explain why I'm late.
Get this final 5% done quickly so I can stop worrying about reliability and just be present with people.

goals.description: Submit the assignment immediately to secure my reliability and avoid the social friction of disappointing Professor prof_assignment.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) drives me to prioritize avoiding interpersonal conflict above all else. Missing this deadline now would force a confrontation or explanation I desperately want to avoid, damaging trust with my professor. My deliberate nature means I know delaying further only increases the risk of failure, so submitting now is the only way to preserve the relationship.

agent.last_reasoning: I must finish the assignment to avoid disappointing prof_assignment; that social friction is unbearable. I'm ignoring my sleep debt and stress because preserving trust now outweighs rest. Once submitted, I'll text teammate_A so they don't feel neglected while I power through.
